data.description: ISRAELI MILITARY: A SHORT WHILE AGO SEVERAL WAVES OF STRIKES WERE CARRIED OUT ON TEHRAN
IDF REPORTS THEY HAVE FINISHED STRIKES IN TEHRAN RECENTLY.

data.title: Fredonia Mining Inc. Engages ICP Securities Inc. for Automated Market Making Services and Enters Into Investor Relations and Capital Markets Advisory Agreement
data.description: On March 25, 2026, Fredonia Mining Inc. revealed its partnerships for market-making, investor relations, and capital markets advisory services. The company has engaged proficient professionals to amplify its capital markets exposure as it progresses exploration activities at the El Dorado-Monserrat gold/silver project in Santa Cruz, Argentina. This strategic decision aims to bolster Fredonia's presence in the capital markets for further advancement in its exploration endeavors.

data.title: Aecon joint venture finalizes contract for the Howard A. Hanson Dam Facility project in Washington State
data.description: Aecon Group Inc. (TSX: ARE) recently disclosed that the FlatironDragados-Aecon Joint Venture, in which Aecon holds a 40% stake alongside FlatironDragados with 60%, has sealed a contract worth US$691 million with the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers (“USACE”). This deal pertains to the Howard A. Hanson Dam Additional Water Storage Fish Passage Facility project located in Washington State. The captured contract value for Aecon will boost its Construction segment backlog for the initial quarter of 2026.
Record high HIFU revenue figures reported by EDAP for Q4 and full-year 2025.

data.title: Bladex Outlines 2030 Strategy to Drive Sustainable Growth and Higher Returns at Investor Day
data.description: Today in Panama City, the multinational company Bladex (NYSE: BLX), established by the central banks of 23 Latin American and Caribbean nations to enhance foreign trade and economic integration in the area, organized its 2026 Investor Day. This event aimed to provide insight into the company's performance and future plans.

data.title: Artelo Biosciences Expansion into $16.3B Glaucoma Market, Via Fully Funded Study, Highlights Multi-Platform Pipeline Strength
data.description: Artelo Biosciences is strategically positioned for long-term growth beyond a single indication with the development of three clinical programs centered around a core molecule. The company's capital-efficient approach emphasizes sustainability and potential expansion. This multi-faceted strategy underscores their commitment to maximizing growth opportunities in the biopharmaceutical sector.

data.title: PetWise Appoints Founder Aaron Lamstein as Chief Executive Officer
data.description: Bringing more than 30 years of industry and executive background, Mr. Lamstein joins PetWise in Novato, California. He is known for his proficiency in innovation and customer-centric strategies. PetWise, Inc., a prominent company in the pet solutions sector, gains a valuable addition to its team in Mr. Lamstein.
Proposed adjustment to the principal amount of affected securities, meeting of ETP security holders adjourned.

data.title: McNally Capital Announces Promotions of Four Team Members
data.description: Chicago-based private equity firm McNally Capital has recently promoted four of its team members. Brooks Hulett, Rob Kirk, Luther Rice, and Mary Pizzo have all been elevated to new positions within the company.

data.title: Irish officers unlock 1 of 12 Bitcoin wallets in $418M drug case, seizing 500 BTC ($34M) with Europol’s aid from 2019.
data.description: With the assistance of Europol, Ireland's Criminal Assets Bureau successfully gained access to 500 Bitcoins, which are valued at approximately $34 million. These digital assets were stored in wallets that were confiscated back in 2019.

data.title: 51Talk Online Education Group to Report Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results on Friday, March 27, 2026
data.description: A financial update conference call is set to take place at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time on March 27, 2026 in SINGAPORE. The 51Talk Online Education Group revealed the news on March 25, 2026. The Company, traded as COE on the NYSE American, specializes in English education and operates as a global online education provider.

data.title: Saramonic Launches Ultra-Compact Dual-Form Saramonic Air SE to Define Portable Audio for Mobile Creators
data.description: In March 25, 2026, a new product was introduced by Saramonic in New York. The company unveiled the Saramonic Air SE, an ultra-compact wireless microphone designed to offer high-quality sound to beginner content creators. This new device features a remarkably light 5g microphone, setting a new standard in the industry.

data.title: Worldcoin (WLD) aims to reach $0.35 by April 2026 from current $0.32 trading level, technical analysis indicates.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Worldcoin (WLD) is currently trading at a value of $0.32, while its Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at a neutral level of 39.27. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of a potential recovery to reach the resistance level of $0.35 within the next 4-6 weeks, provided the current support remains stable.

data.title: Local Bounti Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: Achieving a notable 27% annual revenue growth, the company also saw positive improvements in net loss and adjusted EBITDA in the first quarter of 2026. Progress was made in advancing strategic retail partnership discussions during this period. Furthermore, new retail accounts were secured, aiming to enhance distribution and optimize channel mix. Additionally, an existing strategic investor concluded an additional investment round.
